title: 70年代風ロボットアニメ ゲッP-X
description:
It’s the year 197X…

A mysterious force calling itself the Cosmic Demon Empire suddenly launched an assault on Earth, commanding an army of colossal beast-shaped war machines known as the Space Beasts. Meanwhile, at a certain top-secret Space Robot Laboratory somewhere in the Far East, preparations had been made “just in case something like this ever happened”. Thus, the newly developed transforming and combining combat robot GEPPY-X was deployed into action.

Never before released outside of Japan, 70’s-Style Robot Anime GEPPY-X will now be available to play worldwide!

A love letter to Japanese mecha anime from the 70’s, this fast-paced 2D side-scrolling shooter has undergone a transformation of its own. Battle the Cosmic Demon Empire with quality of life improvements such as faster load times, rewind, save states, and more! 

Experience GEPPY-X with subtitles in eight new languages and full restoration of the 8,000 hand-drawn frames from the original Betacam master tapes. The original PlayStation release squeezed the animation into four discs at 320x240 resolution and only 15fps. For this new release, each “episode” has had its opening theme, previews, commercials, and end credits re-digitized and restored to its original 24fps.

Features

• Never suffer from a mistake or miss a commercial with the ability to rewind

• Save and reload at any point with Save States

• Trophies/Achievements

• Fully restored Betacam tapes re-digitized to 24fps with optional upscaling (optional setting will follow shortly after launch)

• Original Japanese voice overs including iconic voices from classic 90’s anime such as Akira Kamiya, Shō Hayami, Shūichi Ikeda, Ichirō Nagai, Gorō Naya, and more

• Original soundtrack including legendary anime theme artists Isao Sasaki, Akira Kushida, and Hironobu Kageyama

• Localized subtitles (available in English, Japanese, French, Spanish, Italian, German, Korean, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese)

• Transform between three combat forms in real time, mastering balance, speed, and power

• Rapid Fire Option

• Relax your hands and fire your main and sub weapons by holding R2/L2 instead of button mashing!

• CRT filters - Relive the retro experience with several filter options, including CRT curvature

• Digital Gameplay Manual

• 6 Unlockable Extra Modes including:

• Boss Rush

• Alternate Timelines

• Experimental Episode Variants
description_short: A fully remastered 70s-style super robot anime meets fast-paced arcade-style 2D side-scrolling shooter action. A Japanese cult classic finally available worldwide — now reborn in HD.
